ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "home_address" TEXT /* Home address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "email_address" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the customer account (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "credit_limit" INTEGER /* Credit limit assigned to the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the customer */,
  "income_range" TEXT /* Income range of the customer */,
  "credit_score" INTEGER /* Credit score of the customer */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the customer's record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "customer_id" TEXT /* Reference to the customer involved in the interaction */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., call, email, visit) */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date when the interaction occurred */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes about the interaction */,
  "interaction_channel" TEXT /* Channel of interaction (e.g., call center, branch, online) */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the interaction in minutes */,
  "interaction_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the interaction (e.g., resolved, pending, escalated) */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee who handled the interaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_interactions_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_interactions_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "credit_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "customer_id" TEXT /* Reference to the customer involved in the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., credit card payment, loan repayment) */,
  "amount" INTEGER /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date when the transaction occurred */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., completed, pending) */,
  "transaction_reference" TEXT /* Unique reference number for the transaction */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, bank transfer) */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the transaction */,
  "approval_code" TEXT /* Approval code from the payment processor */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who authorized the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_credit_transactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_credit_transactions_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the role is associated with */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role of the user */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the user within the bank */,
  "date_hired" TEXT /* Date the user was hired */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged into the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
